panels.description: Medium shot: The wretch stands on the icy deck of the vessel, his face contorted with bitter fury, clutching his chest, stormy arctic sky in the background, jagged ice blocks visible.

bubbles.text: Am I to be thought the only criminal? My blood boils at the recollection of this injustice!

panels.description: Close up: The wretch looking down at his own scarred, oversized hands, tears freezing on his cheek, shadows deep under his eyes, expression of intense self-loathing.

bubbles.text: But it is true that I am a wretch. I have murdered the lovely and the helpless. You hate me, but your abhorrence cannot equal that with which I regard myself.

panels.description: Medium close-up: The wretch gesturing toward the frozen horizon, his posture slumped but resigned, silhouette against the faint aurora borealis.

bubbles.text: I shall quit your vessel. I shall collect my funeral pile and consume to ashes this miserable frame.

panels.description: Wide shot: A side profile view of the wretch looking up at the sky, wind blowing his long, matted hair, expression transitioning from agony to a haunting, solemn peace.

bubbles.text: Soon these burning miseries will be extinct. Farewell, Frankenstein.

panels.description: Wide action shot: The wretch leaping from the ship's cabin window into the dark, churning arctic water toward a small, crude ice raft, motion blur lines emphasizing the leap, dramatic low angle.
